Pricing

An investment in your success

Summer Prep
49€/month

Full access during the summer before EPFL starts (June–September)

  • Access to all courses and lessons
  • Progressive exercise sets
  • Weekly Zoom sessions (correction + Q&A)
  • Advice on life and organization at EPFL
  • Access to the support community
Join the Waitlist

Timeline

The program runs during the summer, before EPFL starts.

June — September

Private Tutoring

Need individual support? We offer private tutoring sessions as an add-on.

Private tutoring available on request (additional fee).
